meaning: vt.祝贺,庆祝,庆贺,把某人看作有福,庆幸adj.[常用复]祝贺,祝词
examples: I felicitate the day I found you.
I ever felicitate myself secretly that I won't make impertinent remarks or be hurt by them.
Once being eager to stay with someone forever, later, we would felicitate ourselves on leaving him/her. During those transient days, we thought we loved him/her deeply.
